zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前XRP/美元整体呈现震荡偏弱格局，价格围绕1.10附近整理，但持续低于20日均线1.112，显示短线动能不足，市场偏空情绪略占上风

MACD指标维持在零轴下方约-0.009，动能柱偏弱，说明空头动能仍占优势；均线压制明显，反弹缺乏量能配合，短期或维持区间整理偏下行结构

支撑位关注1.0982及1.090整数关口，若跌破可能进一步下探；上方阻力位1.1035与1.112，突破前需放量确认信号确认后再跟进

操作上建议反弹至1.112附近逢高轻仓做空，止损设于1.120上方；若跌破1.098则顺势追空，注意风险控制避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ripple against the US Dollar is currently exhibiting a mild bearish-to-neutral structure, with price action hovering at 1.1006 after a marginal 24-hour decline. The market remains tightly compressed between 1.1035 and 1.0982, suggesting consolidation rather than a strong directional move. Trading below the 20-period SMA at 1.11210 reinforces a short-term bearish bias, though volatility remains subdued and lacks conviction from either bulls or bears, keeping momentum limited.

The MACD reading at -0.009 points to weakening upward momentum and a gradual shift toward bearish pressure. Without a confirmed signal line value, momentum confirmation remains incomplete, but the negative histogram tone still favors sellers in the short term. While RSI is unavailable, price trading beneath the SMA20 typically aligns with neutral-to-bearish conditions. Repeated failures to reclaim 1.1035 indicate that bullish momentum is currently insufficient.

Key support is firmly located at 1.0982, which has already acted as a near-term floor during recent trading. A breakdown below this level could accelerate losses toward the psychological 1.0900 zone, where buyers may attempt to re-enter. On the upside, immediate resistance stands at 1.1035, followed by stronger dynamic resistance at the SMA20 near 1.11210, which remains the key barrier for trend reversal.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies remain most effective under current conditions. Long positions near 1.0982 may be considered with tight risk control below 1.0980, targeting a rebound toward 1.1035. Conversely, short entries near resistance may benefit from prevailing weak momentum. A decisive breakout above 1.11210 would be required to shift sentiment back toward a bullish continuation structure.
